description.value:
Wondering how to carve that to-die-for body without hitting the hard-hitting gym regime? Look no further, for here comes reebok's RunTone Action shoe. Optimized with Moving Air technology, this shoe further activates key muscles in the calves and quads, reducing overall body stress.

This innovative fitness shoe is engineered with built-in balance pods in certain points of the shoe that transfer air in response to your stride. Such air movement creates micro instability with every step you take, forcing the leg muscles to work harder, increasing strength and endurance. Added to this is the DMX Shear cushioning in the reebok RunTone that absorbs shock on impact, enhancing comfort for the feet even during long runs.

Toning with balance pods
A great hit with men and women alike this season, the Reebok RunTone Action sneaker has a vast array of pods fitted in the outsole. When on the run, these pods shift air about beneath the shoe creating an unstable feel. The body instantly reacts and experiments with various muscle positions to compensate for this instability. The outcome: a progressive sneaker that forces tougher functioning of important muscle tissues, toning up the leg and butt.

Besides the harmony ball inspired pods, the Reebok RunTone also has a synthetic mesh upper that provides excellent ventilation and dry comfort. IMEVA midsole to enhance cushioning, shock absorption and comfort. What's even better is that the Reebok EasyTone comes with a removable sockliner that can accommodate a medical orthotic, making running an all the more pleasurable experience.

Upper
Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays provide breath ability
Lace-ups for snug Fit
Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort
Mesh tongue for greater breath ability
Breathable mesh lining and a removable insert

Midsole
Removable footbed that can be replaced with a medical orthotic
IMEVA midsole delivers cushioned support and shock absorption

Outsole
Features balance ball-inspired pods with Moving Air Technology that transfer air in response to your stride and create micro-instability with every step
Forefoot flex-grooves provide flexibility through footstrike and toe-off
Multi-surface rubber outsole for traction and durability

Shoe care
Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust
Do not machine wash

data.productDisplayName: Reebok Men Runtone Action White Sports Shoes
